message:
test(analytics): Track B cost breakdown and drilldown navigation coverage

Adds targeted tests for recently shipped analytics features:

- query_breakdown_agent_with_cost_metric_uses_track_b: verifies that
  EstimatedCostUsd metric correctly routes Agent dimension through
  token_daily_stats (Track B), with expected cost aggregation for
  claude_code (1.90) and codex (0.80).
- query_breakdown_model_with_cost_metric_orders_by_cost: confirms Model
  dimension orders results by estimated_cost_usd DESC.
- analytics_drilldown_back_navigation_preserves_selection: ensures the
  analytics_selection index survives drilldown→search→back navigation
  via the view stack.
- day_label_to_epoch_range_validates_calendar_dates: validates edge cases
  including leap year handling and invalid month/day rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
